---
title: "Data Preparation"
author: "Anonymous"
date: '2025-02-10'
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
```

This notebook contains the data preparation for the RQ4TLR study.

## Data Loading

```{r data-loading}
df.ind <- read.csv('../../data/output/rq4tlr-merged.csv')
```

```{r data-casting-bool}
vars.bool <- c("duplicate", "nameproblem", "scope", "textorder", "iounquantified", "actoractor", "justification", "happy", "meanuc", "lostfr")

to_bool <- function(value) {
  return(value=="True")
}

df.ind <- df.ind %>% 
  mutate_at(vars.bool, to_bool)
```

```{r data-status}
str(df.ind)
```

```{r data-storing}
write_csv(df.ind, file=file.path('../data/rq4tlr-data.csv'))
```
